title: cyanea elliptica
intro: Cyanea elliptica, also known as Hawaiian hibiscus, is a species of flowering plant native to the Hawaiian Islands, characterized by its bright blue flowers and elliptical leaves. The medicinal properties of Cyanea elliptica include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, thanks to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable remedy in traditional Hawaiian medicine. Cyanea elliptica can be prepared as an herbal tea, salve, or infusion to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
